question: Create `git-op-ubuntu-installeren-en-basisconfig_concepts.txt` and explain how the concept 'Git op Ubuntu installeren en basisconfig' applies to this topic.

validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
[ -f git-op-ubuntu-installeren-en-basisconfig_concepts.txt ] || exit 1
grep -qi "Git op Ubuntu installeren en basisconfig" git-op-ubuntu-installeren-en-basisconfig_concepts.txt || exit 1
[ $(wc -l < git-op-ubuntu-installeren-en-basisconfig_concepts.txt) -ge 2 ] || exit 1
exit 0
